sourceWarning: Anafre's current restaurant-issued menu and happy-hour page are reconciled with the active Mealage ordering catalog linked by the restaurant. The official menu publishes descriptions but no allergen matrix or cross-contact disclosure; only direct positive ingredient or unambiguous formulation terms become fixed allergen signals, missing terms are never negative assurances, and linked-vendor-only rows remain allergen-unavailable. Alcohol-only sections are excluded. Churrasco is restored to Entrées because its steak-and-sides formulation and the linked Platos Fuertes catalog contradict the official page's malformed Pizza placement. Same-formulation spelling and surface variants are consolidated while every source presentation remains recorded.
